case_title: J. YO WONG VS. BERNADETTE GOMES

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-18-2014 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-18-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-18-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WONG, J. YO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GOMES, BERNADETTE THE DECISION AND ORDER OF THE SAN FRANCISCO RENT BOARD ARE CONFIRMED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,643.10 FILED BY WONG, J. YO AS TO DEFENDANT GOMES, BERNADETTE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-18-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEES $35.00 SERVED AUG-26-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GOMES, BERNADETTE
